name: El Bori CR INC
description_short: El Bori CR INC is a credit repair provider based in San Antonio, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 365 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
El Bori CR INC is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Antonio, Texas. With 365 Google reviews and a 5.0/5.0 rating, El Bori CR INC has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a financial consultant, El Bori CR INC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Antonio, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. El Bori CR INC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Antonio, Texas area who are considering El Bori CR INC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
